scope.context: Generated threat model during phase 1; no application files were modified.
limitations: Live Supabase grants and RPC execution were not tested.
Spreadsheet-client formula execution was not dynamically reproduced.
Generated .next artifacts were treated as derived output.
scope.runtimeStatus: No application server or live Supabase instance was started.
scope.summary: Read-only repository-wide scan of the checked-out Next.js/Supabase codebase.
scope.validationMode: Static validation with worker-assisted file review.

assumptions: Supabase RLS is a primary isolation layer
Repository migrations represent intended production policy
attackerCapabilities: Control business names, AI inputs, and request headers
Call exposed Supabase tables/RPCs if grants allow
securityObjectives: Prevent tenant content execution in admin contexts
threatModel.summary: ReveNew is a Next.js/Supabase B2B opportunity-management app whose key boundaries are auth, tenant isolation, platform-admin privileges, service-role database access, usage metering, OpenAI calls, and admin exports.
